name: Huaxun Fangzhou Co., Ltd.
summary: Huaxun Fangzhou Co., Ltd. provides military communication and other products. It offers multidimensional ad hoc network communication systems; multi-band, multi-caliber, and multi-purpose satellite communication antennas and BUC products; and simulation system products. In addition, the company provides information security intelligent penetration systems, information security attack and defense confrontation platforms, and firewall products; and combat management, military training management, electronic sandbox, gun and ammunition management, yingmen integrated management, equipment support management, equipment maintenance management, army vehicle integrated control, valuable and confidential item management, logistics integrated management, military food management, material management, patrol management, camp energy management, and intelligent visitor management systems, as well as military barracks and camp district intelligent security platforms. Further, it offers unmanned aerial vehicles; information security printing systems; optical waveguide products; radio monitoring systems, including wireless time difference positioning system, vehicle-mounted radio monitoring and direction finding system, portable radio monitoring equipment, PCI/PXI interface rugged computing product, and intelligent radio monitoring system; and measurement and control systems comprising laser spot detection recorder, portable testing equipment, and multi-channel data acquisition system, as well as missile, aircraft, and other test equipment. The company was formerly known as Swan Fiber Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huaxun Fangzhou Co., Ltd. in October 2015. Huaxun Fangzhou Co., Ltd. is based in Shenzhen, China.
